name: Green Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red or green bell pepper, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef across grain into thin strips (1/8 inch thick).
2. Combine soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
3. Add beef; toss. Set aside while preparing vegetables.
4. Heat oil in a wok.
5. Add beef to the wok and toss over high heat until browned.
6. Taste the meat. If it is not tender, cover and simmer for 30 to 40 minutes over low heat.
7. Turn the heat up and add vegetables. Toss until vegetables are tender crisp (about 10 minutes).
8. Mix cornstarch with water.
9. Add the mixture to the pan. Stir and cook until thickened.
10. Add tomatoes.
